title: Lightly Fried Uruguayan Peanuts Stir-fry
description: A light and kid-friendly dish featuring fresh peanuts stir-fried with a touch of dairy-free sauce for a simple snack or appetizer.

ingredients.name: Juice of 1 lemon
ingredients.notes: For deglazing and adding acidity to the dish.

instructions: Heat olive oil in a non-stick pan over medium-high heat.
Add peanuts to the pan and stir-fry for about 2-3 minutes or until lightly toasted and golden brown, shaking the pan occasionally.
Deglaze with lemon juice by adding it to the pan after the peanuts have started to toast, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom of the pan. Stir well.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Remove from heat immediately to prevent burning and for a lighter texture.
